_comment: Pricing + subscription limits for tools/subfit-ai/subfit-ai.ts. Edit rates here when providers publish new prices. Script falls back to hard-coded defaults if this file is missing or malformed.
_comment_codex_cacheWrite: OpenAI Codex has no separate cache-write fee (cached-input discount is the only tier). cacheWrite is set to 0 explicitly so the cacheWrite ?? input fallback in costOn() does not overcharge Codex for cache-creation tokens.

claude-pro.label: Claude Pro
claude-pro.note: 40-45 observed, shared across claude.ai + Code + Desktop

claude-max-5x.label: Claude Max 5x
claude-max-5x.note: 225+ baseline, 50 sessions/mo cap, weekly limit unpublished

claude-max-20x.label: Claude Max 20x
claude-max-20x.note: 900+ baseline, 50 sessions/mo cap, weekly limit unpublished

openai-plus.label: OpenAI Plus
openai-plus.note: Codex cloud tasks / 5h; GPT-5.4 local 20-100 / 5h — unverified, check openai.com/pricing

openai-pro.label: OpenAI Pro
openai-pro.note: Codex cloud tasks / 5h; GPT-5.4 local 100-500 / 5h — unverified, check openai.com/pricing

openai-pro-20.label: OpenAI Pro 20x
openai-pro-20.note: Codex cloud tasks / 5h; GPT-5.4 local 400-2000 / 5h — unverified, check openai.com/pricing

mistral-free.label: Mistral Free
mistral-free.note: 6 free messages, 5 web searches, 30 think mode, 5 deep research, 5 code interpreter per day

mistral-pro.label: Mistral Pro
mistral-pro.note: Vibe for all-day coding (pay-as-you-go beyond), 1000 memories, 15GB storage

copilot-free.label: GitHub Copilot Free
copilot-free._monthlyMsgCapSource: Community estimate of ~2,000 code completions/mo on the Free tier — https://github.com/features/copilot/plans
copilot-free.note: Free tier; completion-based metering, translated to message count for comparison

copilot-pro.label: GitHub Copilot Pro
copilot-pro._monthlyMsgCapSource: Community estimate for Copilot Pro's monthly 'premium request' budget — exact figure unpublished. See https://github.com/features/copilot/plans
copilot-pro.note: Limited premium-request quota/mo; unlimited completions on lower-tier models

copilot-business.label: GitHub Copilot Business
copilot-business._monthlyMsgCapSource: Community estimate for Copilot Business's monthly premium-request budget — exact figure unpublished. See https://github.com/features/copilot/plans

copilot-enterprise.label: GitHub Copilot Enterprise
copilot-enterprise._monthlyMsgCapSource: Community estimate for Copilot Enterprise's monthly premium-request budget — exact figure unpublished. See https://github.com/features/copilot/plans
copilot-enterprise.note: Highest Copilot tier, custom models, knowledge base
